summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so each open PR is kept independently for maintainer review. No close, label, merge, fix, or comment actions are planned.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with proof and no evidence of duplicate, supersession, low-signal status, or security-sensitive content. Keep as an independent maintainer-review item.
Useful focused contributor PR with supplied proof and no evidence of duplicate, supersession, low-signal status, or security-sensitive content. Keep as an independent maintainer-review item.
Useful focused contributor PR with supplied proof and no evidence of duplicate, supersession, low-signal status, or security-sensitive content. Keep as an independent maintainer-review item.
Useful focused test-only contributor PR, but the failing check blocks any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout. No closure rationale is present, so keep as an independent maintainer-review item.

Bot-authored focused replacement PR with useful credited prior work, but the failing check blocks any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout. No closure rationale is present, so keep as an independent maintainer-review item.
